2604.13460.title: From Order to Distribution: A Spectral Characterization of Forgetting in Continual Learning
2604.13460.paper_summary: A central challenge in continual learning is forgetting, the loss of performance on previously learned tasks induced by sequential adaptation to new ones. While forgetting has been extensively studied empirically, rigorous theoretical characterizations remain limited. A notable step in this direction is \citet{evron2022catastrophic}, which analyzes forgetting under random orderings of a fixed task collection in overparameterized linear regression. We shift the perspective from order to distribution. Rather than asking how a fixed task collection behaves under random orderings, we study an exact-fit linear regime in which tasks are sampled i.i.d.\ from a task distribution~$Π$, and ask how the generating distribution itself governs forgetting. In this setting, we derive an exact operator identity for the forgetting quantity, revealing a recursive spectral structure. Building on this identity, we establish an unconditional upper bound, identify the leading asymptotic term, and, in generic nondegenerate cases, characterize the convergence rate up to constants. We further relate this rate to geometric properties of the task distribution, clarifying what drives slow or fast forgetting in this model.
2604.13460.paper_summary_zh: 一個持續學習中的核心挑戰是遺忘，即因為對新任務的連續適應而導致在先前學習任務上的性能損失。雖然遺忘已經在實證上得到了廣泛研究，但嚴謹的理論描述仍然有限。在這方面的一個顯著步驟是\citet{evron2022catastrophic}，該研究分析了在過度參數化的線性回歸中，固定任務集合的隨機排序下的遺忘。我們將視角從順序轉向分佈。我們不再詢問固定任務集合在隨機排序下的行為，而是研究一個精確擬合的線性範疇，在這個範疇中，任務是從任務分佈~$Π$中獨立同分佈地抽樣，並詢問生成分佈本身如何影響遺忘。在這種情況下，我們推導出遺忘量的精確算子恆等式，揭示了遞歸的譜結構。基於這個恆等式，我們建立了一個無條件的上界，識別出主導的漸近項，並在一般的非退化情況下，將收斂速率表徵到常數。我們進一步將這個速率與任務分佈的幾何特性相關聯，闡明了在這個模型中驅動緩慢或快速遺忘的因素。
2604.13460.author: Zonghuan Xu et.al.
